testcase.name: completeOrder

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.cssSelector: input[onclick='Billing.save()']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
